formulas.label: eqn0019
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}Z_{L R} \left(u\right) & = & \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - 1} L_{r k f} \cdot H_{r k f} + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \cdot \lambda_{k f} \cdot d_{1 k f}^{2} + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \left(w_{D_{f} , k , f} + \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D_{f} , k , f}\right) \cdot \left(T - d_{D_{f} , k , f}\right) \\ & & - \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - n_{f}} u_{r f} \cdot \left(d_{n_{f} + r , 1 , f} - d_{r , m , 3 - f} - R_{m , 3 - f} - t_{min}\right) \\ & = & \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - 1} L_{r k f} \cdot H_{r k f} + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \cdot \lambda_{k f} \cdot d_{1 k f}^{2} + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \left(w_{D_{f} , k , f} + \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D_{f} , k , f}\right) \cdot \left(T - d_{D_{f} , k , f}\right) \\ & & - \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - n_{f}} u_{r f} \cdot \left(d_{n_{f} + r , 1 , f} - d_{r , m , 3 - f}\right) + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - n_{f}} u_{r f} \cdot \left(R_{m , 3 - f} + t_{min}\right) .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eqn0020
formulas.latex: Z_{L R} \left(u\right) = \underset{f \in F}{\sum} Z_{L R} \left(u , f\right) ,
formulas.mathml:
<mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:xoe="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xoe/dtd" xmlns:bk="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/bk/dtd" xmlns:cals="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/cals/dtd" xmlns:ce="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/dtd" xmlns:ja="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:sa="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-aff/dtd" xmlns:sb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-bib/dtd" xmlns:tb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/table/dtd" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:xocs="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xocs/dtd" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:dcterms="http://purl.org/dc/terms/" xmlns:prism="http://prismstandard.org/namespaces/basic/2.0/" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" altimg="si53.gif" overflow="scroll">

formulas.label: eqn0021
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}Z_{L R} \left(u , f\right) & = & \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - 1} L_{r k f} \cdot H_{r k f} + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \cdot \lambda_{k f} \cdot d_{1 k f}^{2} \\ & & + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \left(w_{D_{f} , k , f} + \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D_{f} , k , f}\right) \cdot \left(T - d_{D_{f} , k , f}\right) - \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - n_{f}} u_{r f} \cdot \left(d_{n_{f} + r , 1 , f} - d_{r , m , f}\right) + \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - n_{f}} u_{r} f \cdot \left(R_{m , f} + t_{m i n}\right) .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eqn0024
formulas.latex: Z_{L R}^{1} \left(u\right) = \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D - 1} L_{r k} \cdot H_{r k} + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \cdot \lambda_{k} \cdot d_{1 k}^{2} + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \left(w_{D , k} + \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D , k}\right) \cdot \left(T - d_{D , k}\right) - \sum_{r = 1}^{D - n} u_{r} \cdot \left(d_{n + r , 1} - d_{r , m}\right) + \sum_{r = 1}^{D - n} u_{r} \cdot \left(R_{m} + t_{m i n}\right) .

formulas.label: eqn0041
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix} & & \mathbf{\mathit{Minimize}} Z_{L R} \left(\mu\right) \\ & & = \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - 1} \frac{1}{2} \delta_{r k f} \cdot H_{r k f} + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \cdot \lambda_{k f} \cdot d_{1 k f}^{2} + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D f , k ,} f \cdot \left(T - d_{D f , k , f}\right) \\ & & + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{k = 2}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f}} \mu_{r k f} \cdot \left(C - n_{r , k - 1 , f} \cdot \left(1 - \varphi_{k f}\right) - b_{r k f}\right) + \sum_{f = 1}^{2} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f}} \mu_{r 1 f} \cdot \left(C - b_{r 1 f}\right) .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: eqn0045
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\mathbf{\mathit{Minimize}} Z_{L R} \left(u , \mu\right) \\ \\ = \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D - 1} \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D , k} \cdot H_{r k} + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \cdot \lambda_{k} \cdot d_{1 k}^{2} + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D , k} \cdot \left(T - d_{D , k}\right) \\ \\ + \sum_{r = 1}^{D - n} u_{r} \cdot \left(d_{r , m} + R_{m} + t_{m i n} - d_{n + r , 1}\right) + \sum_{k = 2}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D} \mu_{r k} \cdot \left(C - n_{r , k - 1} \cdot \left(1 - \varphi_{k}\right) - b_{r k}\right) + \sum_{r = 1}^{D} \mu_{r 1} \cdot \left(C - b_{r 1}\right) .\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: w = \frac{1}{n} \sum_{i = 1}^{n} \left(t - U_{\left(i\right)}\right) = \frac{1}{n} \sum_{i = 1}^{n} \left(t - U_{i}\right) \rightarrow E \left(w \left|\right. N \left(t\right) = n\right) = \frac{1}{n} n E \left(t - U\right) = E \left(t - U\right) = \frac{t}{2} .

formulas.label: eqn0056
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}Z_{L R} \left(u , 2\right) & = & \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{2} - 1} L_{r k 2} \cdot H_{r k 2} + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \cdot \lambda_{k 2} \cdot d_{1 k 2}^{2} \\ & & + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \left(w_{D_{2} , k , 2} + \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D_{2} , k , 2}\right) \cdot \left(T - d_{D_{2} , k , 2}\right) - \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{2} - n_{2}} u_{r 2} \cdot \left(d_{n_{2} + r , 1 , 2} - d_{r , m , 1}\right) + \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{2} - n_{2}} u_{r 2} \cdot \left(R_{m , 1} + t_{m i n}\right) .\end{aligned}

formulas.label: eqn0057
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}Z_{L R} \left(u , f\right) & = & \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - 1} L_{r k f} \cdot H_{r k f} + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \frac{1}{2} \cdot \lambda_{k f} \cdot d_{1 k f}^{2} \\ & & + \sum_{k = 1}^{m} \left(w_{D f , k , f} + \frac{1}{2} \delta_{D f , k , f}\right) \cdot \left(T - d_{D f , k , f}\right) - \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - n_{f}} u_{r f} \cdot \left(d_{n_{f} + r , 1 , f} - d_{r , m , f}\right) + \sum_{r = 1}^{D_{f} - n_{f}} u_{r f} \cdot \left(R m , f + t_{m i n}\right) .\end{aligned}
